summary: Comprehensive backend and frontend testing of Manufacturing CRM completed successfully. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend fully operational with excellent navigation and CRUD operations.

design_issues.issue: Missing accessibility descriptions for DialogContent components

passed_tests: Authentication: Session-based auth with Google SSO integration working
Backend APIs: All 25 CRUD tests passed (100% success rate)
Dashboard: Metrics loading and display working correctly
Plants: Create, edit, delete operations working
Products: Create, edit, delete with plant filtering working
Shift Incharges: Create, edit, delete with crew management working
Notes: Add and view notes functionality working
Production: Full production tracking form and table working
Navigation: All page transitions working smoothly
Logout: Session termination and redirect working
Data-testids: Comprehensive coverage across all pages
Form validation: Required fields and data types working
Mobile responsive: Layout adapts to mobile viewport
